Nanosphere formulation. Composition details: Artemether (10 mg), PLGA (75 mg), PVA (150 mg), Acetone (15 mL), Aqueous phase (30 mL). Particle size: 129.3 ± 3.6 nm, PDI: 0.06 ± 0.01, Zeta potential: -7.4 ± 0.69 mV, EE: 86.9 ± 0.2%, DL: 10.2 ± 0.0%. All numeric values are mean ± SD where applicable.

Nanorod derived from nanospheres. Size reported as Major axis: 234.1 ± 61.7 nm. Other dimensions: Minor axis = 61.3 ± 8.7 nm, Aspect Ratio (AR) = 3.8 ± 0.8, Feret’s diameter = 237.2 ± 61.9 nm, Minor Feret’s diameter = 77.8 ± 13.3 nm. Drug content: 1.8 µg/mg. Process conditions for nanorod formation: Film thickness = 100 µm, Extent of stretching = 4x, Liquefaction method = Acetone, Incubation period = 15 min. The precursor nanospheres were likely prepared by solvent evaporation. All numeric values are mean ± SD where applicable.
